strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production platforms
Strong software craftsmanship background including TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture practices
Relevant AI/LLM and MCP infrastructure exposure aligning with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Seniority mismatch: Staff/Senior-level career trajectory significantly exceeds entry-level role scope
Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience; database history skews toward MongoDB and MySQL
Only basic German proficiency may limit integration in a German construction/consulting context with high on-site presence
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise directly relevant to the technical stack and demonstrates strong engineering discipline, plus bonus AI integration experience. However, the profile is substantially more senior than the entry/mid-level scope described, the database experience leans away from PostgreSQL, and basic German may constrain on-site collaboration in a German renewable-energy consulting environment.
